title: Ovvondrai Thirudugirai Lyrics Jeeva Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ovvondrai Thirudugirai
Singer(s): Karthik, Bhavya Pandit
Music: D.Imman
Movie: Jeeva (2014)

Vittu vittu minnal vettum
saththamindri idi idikkum
iruvar mattum nenayum
mazhai adikkum.

Ovvondrai Thirudugirai Thirudugirai
yaarukkum theriyaamal thirudugiraai
mudhalil en kangalai
irandaavadhu idhayaththai
moondraavadhu muththaththai
muththaththai.

Ovvondrai Thirudugirai Thirudugirai
yaarukkum theriyaamal thirudugiraai
mudhalil en poigalai
irandaavadhu kaigalai
moondraavadhu vetkaththai
vetkaththai.

Nogaamal en thozhil
saaindhaal podhum.
Un nuni mookkai kaadhoodu
nulaiithaal podhum.

Kannodu kan paarkkum
kadhal podhum.
Iru kankonda dhooram pol
thalli iru podhum.

Venmayil peraanmaai
aanamayil orr penmai
kandariyum neramidhu kadhaliye.

..malargiradhe
idhan peyar thaan kaadhal
idhan pinne elugiradhe
adhan peyar thaan kaamam.

Meesayodu mulaikkiradhe
idhan peyarthaan kaadhal.
aasaiyodu alaigiradhe
adhan peyar thaan kaamam.

Ovvondrai Thirudugirai Thirudugirai
yaarukkum theriyaamal thirudugiraai
mudhalil en kangalai
irandaavadhu idhayaththai
moondraavadhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ovvondrai Thirudugirai'?

The song conveys themes of love and connection, expressing emotions of joy and romance.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Jeeva'?

In Jeeva, the song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Bhavya Pandit and Karthik, with music composed by D Imman.

When was 'Ovvondrai Thirudugirai' released?

The song was released on September 11, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Jeeva, 'Ovvondrai Thirudugirai' serves as a celebration of love, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters. The upbeat melody and joyful lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and romance, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The song's vibrant energy and catchy tune resonate with listeners, inviting them to dance along. Overall, it encapsulates the essence of youthful love and the joy it brings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ovvondrai Thirudugirai is a vibrant duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and joy, featuring the melodious voices of Bhavya Pandit and Karthik. With D Imman's enchanting composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits and make you dance. Dive into the world of Jeeva and experience the magic of this delightful track!
stanzaMeanings: Without letting go, the sound of lightning strikes, and it rains only on the two of us.
Stealing without anyone knowing, my eyes are the first to steal the heart, and the pearls are stolen.
Stealing without anyone knowing, my words are the first to steal the hands, and the secrets are stolen.
It's enough if my work is done without any pain. It's enough if your soft lips are touched gently.
It's enough if love is seen with the eyes. It's enough if the distance between the two eyes is pushed away.
In truth, the essence of a woman is revealed in the presence of a man, my beloved.
The flowers are called love, and what follows is called desire.
What grows with the mustache is called love. What flows with the longing is called desire.
The heart melts with your presence, and in love and desire, there is a balance.
Stealing without anyone knowing, my eyes are the first to steal the heart, and the pearls are stolen.
